targets.expr: count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false"}==1) by(namespace) - (count(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Succeeded"}==1) by(namespace) or vector(0)) or count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false"}==1) by(namespace)
